summary.original: Diagnose and fix failing CircleCI builds quickly and safely. Use when users ask to investigate failed CircleCI jobs, triage flaky pipelines, identify root causes from logs, and implement minimal fixes in configuration, test setup, or build-related code paths.
summary.zhCN: CircleCI 构建排障：Diagnose and fix failing CircleCI builds quickly and safely. Use when users ask …

description.original: Diagnose and fix failing CircleCI builds quickly and safely. Use when users ask to investigate failed CircleCI jobs, triage flaky pipelines, identify root causes from logs, and implement minimal fixes in configuration, test setup, or build-related code paths. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: CircleCI 构建排障。Agent-OPT 将官方 SKILL.md 适配为独立 Web 技能工作室：支持章节导航、全文检索、中英对照元数据与只读源码呈现；不执行上游脚本，不访问外部账号。

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier MIT recorded from plugins/circleci/.codex-plugin/plugin.json. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

notes: In-process skill runtime reads only catalog/skill-bodies/<slug> files prepared at curation time.
Upstream scripts, if any, are not executed by Agent-OPT.
No network, credentials, or host filesystem access is granted to the skill body.
Blocked capability note: Requires an authenticated CircleCI project and token that are not available.
The current local reader/playbook adapter does not execute or claim verification of the blocked upstream workflow.
Official path-addressed skill with preserved source text and dedicated Web skill studio.

agent prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
